temp-login-page.intent: Temporary construction-themed login gate for cartercripe.com: public landing (resume/contact) + server-side default-deny gate via Next.js middleware and a shared-password sealed cookie

feat/landing-ui.intent: Scaffold Next.js App Router app and port the approved construction-themed mock-up into the public landing/login page (fonts, assets, single-viewport layout)

feat/auth-gate.intent: Server-side gate: iron-session sealed cookie, login/logout routes with constant-time password check + remember-me, default-deny middleware with public allowlist, placeholder gated /preview page

feat/deploy-setup.intent: Production readiness + README setup guide and the interactive Vercel/domain walkthrough; document v3 Supabase upgrade path
